items.title: Charls Carroll in THE SINISTER ILLUSION - A Kino Corner Short Film
items.author: The Kino Corner
items.content:
It's a year in the making. I know that I've had you guys wait a long time for this, so here it is.

I got the funding to make the film by an app, so if you want more films of mine funded in the future, consider downloading the app!

Link: https://harbor.social/

You can learn more about the app here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bbHAVGukMBw

For Patrons, I'll upload the soundtrack to my Patreon so that you all can download it and listen to it. I think that Youtube's compression might hurt the quality of the film, so I'll post a less-compressed version of the film to Patreon as well.

If you like the short, consider throwing me a couple bucks to get the better version of it on Patreon!
https://www.patreon.com/posts/116717045

Socials
Twitter: https://twitter.com/thekinocorner
Letterboxd: https://letterboxd.com/TheKinoCorner
Patreon: https://patreon.com/thekinocorner

The Cast
@CharlsCarroll1 as Sam Archer
Chris Connell as The Mysterious Man
Arianna Evangelia as Barbara Mason
Joseph Boehm as Luke Mason
Paul Addison as Patrick Mahoney
Jessica Solce as The Anchorwoman
Ian Mason as The Hitman

Shot on Eastman Kodak Double X black and white 16mm film
